since_last: 31% of 84 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.34%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 31% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.45% · BTC -0.64% · Gold -0.95% · Nasdaq100 -1.77%. 31% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.34%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.34%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -4.19%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: INTC is the standout at -9.87%
cards.body: Leaders: NET +8.60%, WDAY +4.07%, INTU +3.32%, META +2.53%, NOW +2.51%. Laggards: INTC -9.87%, AMBA -9.07%, TER -8.33%, AVAV -7.69%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -5.81% at $151.1
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -5.81% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
